title: Southwark Steps And Slipway
author: artfletch
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A slipway and steps by the southern end of Southwark Bridge on the Thames foreshore, London.

Date: unkwon, possibly Victorian.

1081 photos taken in March 2019 with a Sony a6000 and processed in Agisoft Metashape.

Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
